name: Bhai Banta Singh (Hazoori Raagi Amritsar)
body: Bhai Banta Singh Ji studied Gurmat Sangeet under the guidance of the renowned Sant Sarwan Singh Ji Gandharv from Domeli. Bhai Banta Singh Ji possessed similar qualities as his ‘ustad’. He had a vast repertoire of compositions and was adept in various Raags and Taals. Bhai Sahib also served as a Hazoori Raagi in Sri Harmandir Sahib, Amritsar for a few years. If anyone has more information or recordings of Bhai Banta Singh Ji to share, please contact us.
